description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a natural light brown finish and a classic, sturdy design. The front features a set of four drawers on the left and a louvered cabinet door on the right, each with small, dark metal handles. The sides and back of the desk are solid panels with simple recessed detailing, giving it a traditional and elegant appearance. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for writing, working, or placing office equipment. The desk sits on short, bracket-style feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall construction suggests durability and ample storage, making it ideal for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, classic wooden desk with multiple drawers and a louvered cabinet, finished in light brown wood and featuring a broad, flat work surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows four drawers on the left, a louvered cabinet door on the right, and a spacious work surface above.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid wood panel with recessed detailing and no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: The back view reveals two large, plain recessed panels and a continuous flat surface, with no drawers or handles visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a solid wood panel with recessed detailing and no visible hardware.
attribute_orientation: The side with drawers and a louvered cabinet door is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk, while the solid paneled side is the back.
